LanguageData.FCP_Faction_USA.description: Founded on ideals of freedom, prosperity, and technological progress, America is a nation of gleaming cities, suburban comfort, and boundless optimism. Beneath the surface, however, growing paranoia, corporate influence, and military escalation shaped daily life. Citizens enjoyed advanced conveniences, colorful pop culture, and patriotic pride, even as the shadow of nuclear war looms ever closer.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_USA.ideoDescription: The American Dream is the belief that anyone, regardless of their background, can achieve success and prosperity through hard work and determination. It embodies the ideals of freedom, equality, and opportunity that the United States was founded upon.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_USA.label: United States of America
